title: "New Email" in Emails & Activities no longer auto pupulates the "To" field
excerpt:
As per title, the Emails and Activites used to auto populate the “To” field however this no longer seems to work. 
Has something changed? Is something broken on my end? 
Any advice appreciated, Cheers.

posts.author: Tnerb (Brent)
posts.cookedHtml:
As per title, the Emails and Activites used to auto populate the “To” field however this no longer seems to work.

Has something changed? Is something broken on my end?

Any advice appreciated, Cheers.

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Tnerb! I would check with monday.com support because that feature is still working, and I don’t think they’ve implemented any new updates or anything that would change that.

posts.author: Tnerb (Brent)
posts.cookedHtml: I was able to resolve this myself my removing and re-adding the email column.
